title: GenesisAeon/aeon-ai: v0.2.0 – Real-time Phase-Transition Detection and Native Self-Reflection Loop
description: aeon-ai v0.2.0 adds real-time phase-transition detection (PhaseDetector, UTAC-Logistic trigger, collapse detection) and a native closed-loop self-reflection engine (SelfReflector, max 7 iterations, CREP-Lagrangian-Sigillin coupling) to the self-reflective mirror-based AeonAI framework for the GenesisAeon stack.
